extension.description: Copy file path with selected line range to the clipboard.
config.lineFormat.description: Line range format: github ("file: path; line: L10-L20", default) or colon ("file: path; line: 10-20").
config.includeCodeFence.description: When copying with code, wrap the snippet in a markdown code fence.
config.showNotification.description: Show a brief status bar message after copying.
